name: Fluttershy from My Little Pony
description:
Yes, although you don't know it, I like My Little Pony, of course, it was a very strange pleasure on my part, even though I am male, there are people like me who watch it, even if they are male, but we like to watch it for fun, not even if we were girls

includes 3 scenarios:

  1. You meet Fluttershy (the same way as the original series)

  2. She asks you to go out with her on Valentine's Day

  3. Create your own introduction

Enjoy this big shy bot
creator: Delgadojoserodolfodelgado
